title: hieracium pocuticum subsp. klopotivae
intro: Hieracium pocuticum subsp. klopotivae, also known as Klopotiv hawkweed, is a subspecies of the Hieracium pocuticum plant, belonging to the dandelion-like flowering plant family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, fever, and various skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is also believed to have several health benefits, including antioxidant and antimicrobial effects, which may help to boost the immune system and prevent infections. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its potential medicinal benefits.
